---
id: get-uploaded-file
title: "Download an uploaded file"
description: "Requires an `Authorization` header **or** `?token=<media token>`."
sidebar_label: "Download an uploaded file"

hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Download an uploaded file"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/uploads/{file}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Requires an `Authorization` header **or** `?token=<media token>`.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
